gestation_length_African_American.description: Gestational length (in weeks) from a sample of 22 middle-class African American women, with sample mean x̄ = 38.5 weeks. Used in the answer to compute SE and the z test statistic.

gestation_length_general_population.description: Gestational length (in weeks) in the general population of uncomplicated pregnancies, with known population mean μ = 39 weeks and population standard deviation σ = 2 weeks. μ is used as the hypothesized value and σ is used to compute the standard error in the answer.
